title: Device  Home Screen - Starting app without internet connection
scenario: Verify that the app loads missing internet-dependent content (e.g., images) after re-establishing an internet connection.
steps: Launch the app while the device has no internet connection.
Observe the device list — verify the device appears on the list.
Check features that require internet (e.g., images on the home page) — note that they are missing or not displayed.
Turn on the internet connection on the device.
Wait for the app to refresh or manually refresh the app.
Verify that all data and images load and display properly.
expected: After turning on the internet, all data and images should load and display properly.
